observations: NDVI plateaued for 10 days at mid-canopy values
claimed_outcome: Grain yield will increase versus no top-dress
label: underdetermined
falsifier: Randomized plot trial with biomass sampling at heading

observations: Probe at sowing depth: 8% moisture (below germination threshold)
claimed_outcome: Uniform emergence within 7 days without irrigation
label: refuted
distractor: Chickpea tolerates any moisture at sowing

observations: Post-harvest NDVI near zero on 70% of plots
Stubble incorporation completed on those plots
claimed_outcome: Potato emergence timing comparable to bare-soil baseline
label: supported
falsifier: Emergence date distribution vs historical bare-soil control

observations: Canopy still turgid in morning inspection
claimed_outcome: Root-zone moisture will remain adequate for 2 weeks
label: refuted
distractor: Canopy appearance fully tracks root zone

observations: Bhuvan SMS soil moisture: moderate (3-day aggregate)
intervention: Use SMS alone to authorize sowing today
claimed_outcome: Surface moisture is adequate for germination today
label: refuted
distractor: SMS always equals instantaneous surface moisture

intervention: Form beds Sunday with irrigation backup
claimed_outcome: Bed moisture will be sufficient for transplant if irrigation used
label: supported
falsifier: Bed moisture probe after forming + irrigation
distractor: Rain forecast alone guarantees bed moisture

observations: University advisory: standard window not yet open
intervention: Sow early heat-escape variety this week
label: refuted

claimed_outcome: Soil structure will improve for rabi beds
label: refuted

observations: NDVI shows 70% plots ready after incorporation
claimed_outcome: Long-term soil organic matter unchanged vs incorporation
label: refuted
falsifier: Organic matter sampling burn vs incorporate plots
distractor: Burn and incorporate are agronomically identical

observations: District bulletin: deficient rains (lead not updated)
claimed_outcome: Cooperative will sow this week if informed of probe
label: supported
falsifier: Observe cooperative meeting outcome after probe disclosure
distractor: Bulletin alone determines sowing with no belief update

intervention: Delay 3 days per agronomist with irrigation option
claimed_outcome: Delayed sowing reduces compaction risk if moisture rises
label: supported
falsifier: Moisture + emergence on delayed vs immediate plots
distractor: Cloud cover proves soil is dry

claimed_outcome: Irrigation restores root-zone moisture before stress symptoms
label: supported
distractor: Morning turgidity rules out any deficit
